notes: Two fixes. (1) Numpad/calculator: was using hardcoded dark gradient bg + rgba(255,255,255,X) button tints — invisible text in light mode. Now uses theme-aware var(--bg-raised), var(--bg-card), var(--bg-elevated). Works in both themes. (2) Scenario edit modal: Save/Cancel buttons moved from inside .tx-modal-body to a sticky .tx-modal-foot at the bottom of the modal frame. .tx-modal is now flex-column layout: header + scrollable body + pinned footer. Save button always visible regardless of how tall the form gets, never hidden behind bottom nav. Foot has safe-area-inset bottom padding for iPhone home indicator clearance.
